description: Major Irish transnational organised crime syndicate founded by Christy Kinahan in the 1990s. Based in Dublin, it is one of the largest criminal groups globally, involved in drug trafficking, money laundering, and arms trafficking. Estimated wealth up to €1 billion. Engaged in a violent feud with the Hutch Gang since 2015.

country_links.evidence_quote: Imre 'The Butcher' Arakas – An Estonian hitman, he is known for committing murders in several European countries, including Estonia, Lithuania, Spain and Ireland...
country_links.context: Imre Arakas, an Estonian hitman, committed murders for the Kinahan group in Estonia.

country_links.evidence_quote: It is also established in the UK, Spain, and the United Arab Emirates.
country_links.context: The Kinahan Organised Crime Group is established in Spain and its associates operate drug shipments from there.

country_links.evidence_quote: Authorities believe that the Kinahan cartel coordinated with Hezbollah in a failed attempt to smuggle 2.2 tons of cocaine from Venezuela to Ireland in September 2023.
country_links.context: The Kinahan cartel coordinated with Hezbollah to smuggle cocaine from Venezuela to Ireland.
